source_old_req: The ADIRUp_HM thread shall operate with a periodic dispatch protocol, a period of 4000 ms, a deadline of 500 ms, and a priority of 5. The thread shall assume that the input data ports accData_in1 through accData_in6 contain valid SHM_DataType::accData values at each execution. The thread shall guarantee that the output data ports accData_out1 through accData_out6, the event data port adirup_error_action, and the event data port adirup_error_out depend solely on the current values of the input ports and the internal computations of the thread. Additionally, the thread shall ensure that all output values conform to the SHM_DataType::accData and SHM_DataType::errorData data types, respectively, and that the internal state updates do not violate the data type constraints of the ports.
natural_requirement: The ADIRUp_HM component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for ADIRUp_HM.impl. In the implementation layer, ADIRUp_HM.impl shall route data flow from accData_in1 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para1 through C1 and data flow from accData_in2 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para2 through C2.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall route the data flow from accData_in1 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para1 through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from accData_in1 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para1.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall route the data flow from accData_in2 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para2 through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from accData_in2 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para2.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from accData_in1 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para1. The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from accData_in2 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para2.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall route the data flow from accData_in1 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para1 through connection C1. The ADIRUp_HM.impl implementation shall route the data flow from accData_in2 to ADIRUp_HM.inData_para2 through connection C2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
